title: Indulgent Comte and Galette Tart
description: A rich and buttery galette crust filled with a creamy comte cheese and topped with a fluffy egg mixture. Perfect for a decadent dessert.

ingredients.name: Comte cheese
ingredients.notes: High-quality, aged comte for the best flavor

ingredients.name: Galette dough
ingredients.notes: Homemade or store-bought, chilled until firm

ingredients.name: Eggs
ingredients.notes: For the fluffy egg mixture on top

instructions: Roll out the galette dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Transfer the dough to a 9-inch tart pan with a removable bottom.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the comte cheese and eggs.
Add a pinch of salt and stir until smooth.
Pour the cheese mixture into the galette crust.
Dot the top with butter and sprinkle with fresh thyme, if using.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the filling is set.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes.
